column1: # results.tsv — 闭环训练评分记录
#   match_score     - 严格匹配率 = match_count / total_items (0.00-1.00)
#   weighted_score  - 加权得分 = (match*1 + partial*0.5) / total_items
#   new_rules       - 本轮新增 SOP 规则数
#   sop_total       - 当前 SOP 规则总数
#   delta_codes     - 差异类型汇总 (如 KNOW:2,REG:1,STAT:1,ALT:1)
#   notes           - 备注 (异常/特殊情况)
#   - 收敛信号: 连续 3 轮 match_score ≥ 0.70 且 new_rules ≤ 1
#   - 发散信号: 连续 3 轮 match_score 下降 或 new_rules 持续 ≥ 4
#   - 监控指标: 5-round rolling average of match_score
#   - 目标: 最终 5 轮平均 match_score ≥ 0.65, weighted_score ≥ 0.75
